Typography

AGDS-vue uses a system font stack — no external fonts are loaded. All typographic values are available as --agds-font-* tokens.

Font family

system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif

--agds-font-family-body

Size scale

--agds-font-size-xs0.75rem / 12px

xs — The quick brown fox

--agds-font-size-sm0.875rem / 14px

sm — The quick brown fox

--agds-font-size-md1rem / 16px

md — The quick brown fox

--agds-font-size-lg1.125rem / 18px

lg — The quick brown fox

--agds-font-size-xl1.25rem / 20px

xl — The quick brown fox

--agds-font-size-2xl1.5rem / 24px

2xl — The quick brown fox

--agds-font-size-3xl1.875rem / 30px

3xl — The quick brown fox

--agds-font-size-4xl2.25rem / 36px

4xl — The quick brown fox

Font weights

The quick brown fox

--agds-font-weight-normal

Normal (400)

The quick brown fox

--agds-font-weight-medium

Medium (500)

The quick brown fox

--agds-font-weight-semibold

Semibold (600)

The quick brown fox

--agds-font-weight-bold

Bold (700)
